title: Pokémon Damage Calculator

item.Eviolite: (Not fully evolved Pokémon: Def & Sp. Def x1.5)
item.Iron Ball: (Speed stat x0.5, Flying-types hit by Ground moves)

ability.Overgrow: (When HP is less than 1/3, Grass-type move power x1.5)
ability.Blaze: (When HP is less than 1/3, Fire-type move power x1.5)
ability.Torrent: (When HP is less than 1/3, Water-type move power x1.5)
ability.Swarm: (When HP is less than 1/3, Bug-type move power x1.5)
ability.Protean: (Changes the Pokémon's type to that of its move, gaining STAB)
ability.Stakeout: (Deals double damage to Pokémon that switch in during the turn)
ability.Tinted Lens: (Doubles the power of moves that are 'not very effective')
ability.Iron Fist: (Punching moves have their power increased by 20%)
ability.Flash Fire: (Boosts Fire-type move power by 1.5x after being hit by a Fire-type move)
ability.Adaptability: (Increases STAB bonus from 1.5x to 2x; 2.25x when Terastallized to the same type)
ability.Solar Power: (In sunny weather, increases Special Attack by 1.5x but loses 1/8 max HP each turn)
ability.Technician: (Moves with 60 base power or less have their power increased by 1.5x)
ability.Hustle: (Increases Attack by 1.5x but lowers physical move accuracy to 80%)
ability.Water Bubble: (Doubles the power of Water-type moves and halves damage from Fire-type moves)
ability.Sharpness: (Boosts the power of slicing moves by 1.5x)
ability.Tough Claws: (Boosts the power of contact moves by 1.3x)
ability.Rivalry: (If the opponent is the same gender, move power x1.25; if opposite gender, move power x0.75)
ability.Reckless: (Boosts the power of moves with recoil by 1.2x)
ability.Plus: (When a teammate has Plus or Minus, Special Attack is increased by 1.5x)
ability.Minus: (When a teammate has Plus or Minus, Special Attack is increased by 1.5x)
ability.Guts: (Increases Attack by 1.5x when afflicted by a status condition)
ability.Sheer Force: (Moves with additional effects have their power increased by 1.3x but lose their additional effects)
ability.Sand Force: (Increases the power of Rock, Steel, and Ground-type moves by 1.3x during a sandstorm)
ability.Electromorphosis: (Becomes charged when hit by a move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move)
ability.Wind Power: (Becomes charged when hit by a wind move or Tailwind, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move)
ability.Pixilate: (Turns Normal-type moves into Fairy-type and increases their power by 1.2x)
ability.Galvanize: (Turns Normal-type moves into Electric-type and increases their power by 1.2x)
ability.Punk Rock: (Boosts the power of sound-based moves by 1.3x and reduces damage from sound-based moves by 50%)
ability.Analytic: (Boosts move power by 1.3x when moving last in a turn)
ability.Mega Launcher: (Boosts the power of aura and pulse moves by 1.5x)
ability.Sniper: (Increases critical hit damage multiplier from 1.5x to 2.25x)
ability.Supreme Overlord: (Increases damage by 10% for each fainted ally upon entering battle)
ability.Protosynthesis: (Increases highest stat by 1.3x in harsh sunlight or when holding Booster Energy; if Speed is the highest stat, it increases by 1.5x)
ability.Quark Drive: (Increases highest stat by 1.3x in Electric Terrain or when holding Booster Energy; if Speed is the highest stat, it increases by 1.5x)
ability.Orichalcum Pulse: (Summons harsh sunlight upon entering battle; increases Attack by 33% in harsh sunlight)
ability.Hadron Engine: (Activates Electric Terrain upon entering battle; increases Special Attack by 33% in Electric Terrain)
ability.Thick Fat: (Halves damage from Fire and Ice-type moves)
ability.Purifying Salt: (Halves damage from Ghost-type moves and prevents status conditions)
ability.Heatproof: (Halves damage from Fire-type moves and burn damage)
ability.Multiscale: (Halves damage taken when at full HP)
ability.Marvel Scale: (Increases Defense by 1.5x when afflicted by a status condition)
ability.Fur Coat: (Halves damage from physical moves but doubles damage from Fire-type moves)
ability.Dry Skin: (Increases damage taken from Fire-type moves by 25%)
ability.Tablets of Ruin: (Not affected by Tablets of Ruin's field effect)
ability.Sword of Ruin: (Not affected by Sword of Ruin's field effect)
ability.Vessel of Ruin: (Not affected by Vessel of Ruin's field effect)
ability.Beads of Ruin: (Not affected by Beads of Ruin's field effect)
ability.Refrigerate: （Turns Normal-type moves into Ice-type and increases their power by 1.2x）
ability.Aerilate: （Turns Normal-type moves into Flying-type and increases their power by 1.2x）
ability.Dragonize: (Turns Normal-type moves into Dragon-type and increases their power by 1.2x)
ability.Mega Sol: (All moves used by the Pokémon to behave as if the weather were harsh sunlight)
